calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Kap Investments, LLC.,
Kevin Colombo sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaitiff.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Jenniver Hodges Dill.
Defult of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $114,126.16
Pre-Judgment Interest: $52,798.14
Attorney's Fees: $25,000.00
Costs: $530.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $192,454.30

Attorney for Plaintiff to provide declaration re: Attorneys' fees and a copy of the Law cited in reference to this request for attorney's fees.
Plaintiff to submit proposed judgment.
